title: Jodrellia migiurtina
taxonomy: Jodrellia migiurtina is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This family is further divided into several subfamilies, with Jodrellia migiurtina belonging to the subfamily Epidendroideae. The subfamily Epidendroideae is one of the largest and most diverse groups within Orchidaceae, consisting of over 20,000 species. Jodrellia migiurtina is a genus of orchids native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Island. The genus Jodrellia is generally recognized as being part of the tribe Coelogyneae within the subfamily Epidendroideae.
